title: WATCH:  Mexican marines on patrol in Cancun in wake of cartel violence
fullText: Mexican marines on patrol in Cancun in wake of cartel violenceABC News' Matt Rivers went on patrol with Mexican marines in Cancun as authorities in the country step up security efforts.February 25, 2026
summary: ABC News' Matt Rivers went on patrol with Mexican marines in Cancun as authorities in the country step up security efforts.
